findings.evidence: The proof itself needs `rw [prefixLaw_apply, map_blockLaw_reindex ...]` at line 175; `rg map_prefixLaw_reindex` finds no public coordinate-reindexing prefix lemma.
findings.fix: Add a named `map_prefixLaw_reindex` or narrower `map_prefixLaw_castLE` lemma, analogous to existing `map_prefixLaw`, and use it instead of unfolding `prefixLaw`.
findings.issue: `map_blockLaw_reindex` is exposed as reusable projection API, but there is no corresponding `prefixLaw` projection lemma, so users must unfold `prefixLaw` to project prefixes.

findings.evidence: Roadmap key milestones list `exists_perm_extending_strictMono`, `contractable_of_exchangeable`, `Contractable.map_single`, `Contractable.map_pair`, and `Contractable.comp`, while these four names only appear in this PR file.
findings.fix: Keep only the roadmap/target-facing declarations public, or make these private until a downstream target actually needs these names.
findings.issue: `Contractable.allStrictMono_eq`, `shift_segment_eq`, `shift_and_select`, and `restrict` are new public corollaries that are immediate wrappers around `Contractable.map` but are not part of the roadmap target’s named API.

summary: The main bridge is present, but the public surface around coordinate reindexing is incomplete and several one-line specializations are exposed without a roadmap need.
